SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Built on Expertise, Driven by Results

H&L Home Remodeling was founded on a simple principle: deliver exceptional remodeling services with unwavering integrity. We saw a need for a contractor that prioritizes clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and a commitment to exceeding client expectations. What started as a small team has grown into a leading remodeling company in Las Vegas, built on referrals and repeat business.

Our approach is straightforward. We listen to your vision, develop a comprehensive plan, and execute it with precision. We understand the challenges of remodeling in the desert climate, from intense UV exposure to the unique soil conditions. We use proven techniques and quality materials to ensure your remodel stands the test of time.

We're more than just a remodeling company; we're part of the Las Vegas community. We actively support local charities and organizations, and we're committed to sustainable building practices. We believe in giving back to the city that has given us so much.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose H&L Home Remodeling LLC

Expert Craftsmanship

Decades of combined experience ensures quality work done right, the first time.

Clear Communication

We keep you informed every step of the way, from initial consultation to final walkthrough.

Durable Materials

We use only the highest quality materials designed to withstand the harsh Nevada climate.

Guaranteed Satisfaction

We stand behind our work. Your satisfaction is our top priority.

Ready to Transform Your Home?

Contact H&L Home Remodeling today for a free consultation and estimate.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

H&L Home Remodeling completely transformed my outdated kitchen. They listened to my ideas and created a beautiful and functional space that I absolutely love. The team was professional, efficient, and always kept me informed throughout the process. Highly recommend!

Maria S. Kitchen Remodel
“

We hired H&L to remodel our master bathroom. The results were fantastic, exceeding our expectations. There were a couple of minor delays due to material availability, but the team communicated proactively and kept us in the loop. Overall, a great experience.

David K. Bathroom Remodel
“

This was a huge project - remodeling our entire 1970s home in the Scotch 80s neighborhood. H&L handled it with professionalism and skill. They helped us modernize the space while maintaining its original charm. The team was responsive, and the quality of workmanship was outstanding.

Lisa P. Whole Home Remodel
“

H&L Home Remodeling built a fantastic patio cover for our backyard. It provides much-needed shade during the hot summer months, and it looks great! The team was efficient, courteous, and cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done. I highly recommend them.

Robert M. Patio Cover Installation
“

H&L did a great job painting the exterior of our house. They were meticulous in their preparation and applied two coats of high-quality paint. The house looks brand new! The only reason I'm not giving them 5 stars is that the project took a little longer than expected.

Jennifer L. Exterior Painting
“

We added a new bedroom to our home, and H&L Home Remodeling did an excellent job. The addition blends seamlessly with the existing structure, and the quality of workmanship is top-notch. The team was professional, reliable, and easy to work with.

Michael B. Room Addition

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?
The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 4-8 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation phase.
Do you offer financing options?
Yes, we partner with several reputable lenders to offer flexible financing options to our clients. Contact us to learn more about available programs.
Can you help with the design process?
Absolutely! Our experienced designers will work closely with you to create a kitchen that reflects your style and meets your needs. We'll provide 3D renderings to help you visualize the final result.
